packageRules.description: TypeScript 7 changed internals (the native/Go-based rewrite) that svelte-check@4.7.3 (latest published release) hasn't been updated for — it crashes with `TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'useCaseSensitiveFileNames')` in its bundled FileMap/ConfigLoader code. Tracked upstream at https://github.com/sveltejs/language-tools/issues/3063. Held for manual approval on the Dependency Dashboard instead of disabled outright, so it isn't blocked forever: once that issue closes (expected in svelte-check v4.8 or v5.0), tick the checkbox to raise this PR again.
